# Understand Lite

Build a low-token, deterministic structural knowledge graph for a repo using cheap scanning and import resolution, then save it in .understand-anything/ for the dashboard.

## Install

```sh
npx github:Elvis020/hey-skills add understand-lite --to ./skills
```
